title: AT Field Pattern Blood Type Blue A
display_title: AT Field Pattern Blood Type Blue A
wikitext:
[]: AT Field Pattern: Blood Type: Blue **A'             Quote Post by K40s » Mon Feb 11, 2013 11:35 am This are scans from Nerv HQ computers about Eva-01's ATF. You can see them in NME 1.11 during the 4th Angel and the 6th Angel's battles. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Feb 17, 2013 10:29 am "A" stands for Adam? ** means it's the second one of four Adams?

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Sun Feb 17, 2013 3:38 pm Giji Shinka wrote: "A" stands for Adam? ** means it's the second one of four Adams?

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Feb 17, 2013 3:57 pm K40s wrote: you forgot the "'", (**) 2nd (A) Adam (') Modified/Upgraded?? This puts into perspective 3rd Impact, eva-01 started 3I shenanigans before killing Zeruel and absorbing eva-00's core... Too bad there're no other screens with something similar for comparison. Maybe **A' means the 3rd Adam? the 2nd being *A' and the 1st A'

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Feb 18, 2013 12:02 pm Or, since EVA's are supposed to be modeled after humans to some degree, it really means good old regular blood type A, with the asterisks signifying the angelic addons.

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Mon Feb 18, 2013 10:08 pm Also notice how the 4th angel's blood is "blue 04" the question remains is it blue 04 because it's the 4th angel's, so the 3rd angel is blue 03 and so on or does it mean something else? I'd really like to see another screenie like this for another angel and another eva....

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Mon Feb 18, 2013 10:47 pm K40s wrote: Also notice how the 4th angel's blood is "blue 04" the question remains is it blue 04 because it's the 4th angel's, so the 3rd angel is blue 03 and so on or does it mean something else? I'd really like to see another screenie like this for another angel and another eva....

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Tue Feb 19, 2013 12:31 am Eva 04 wrote: I dont think there is another scene like that. There might be one when the 6th Angel first attacks but I'm not totally positive.

[]:             Quote Post by airman4 » Sat May 04, 2013 7:28 pm So eva 01 is based on Adam ? in rebuild ?

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Wed May 22, 2013 3:04 am I found more!! in 1.11 SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Wed May 22, 2013 3:55 am Now we have to find, if we see any other Eva's (Not) having the same pattern like Eva-01 has.

[]:             Quote Post by xdiesp » Wed May 22, 2013 12:43 pm Those graphs are cool, full of absolute bs numbers.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed May 22, 2013 12:55 pm In 2.22 Bardiel is simply identified as "Blood Pattern BLUE".

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Wed May 22, 2013 1:14 pm riffraff11235 wrote: In 2.22 Bardiel is simply identified as "Blood Pattern BLUE".

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Wed May 22, 2013 10:28 pm All the pics I found are from 1.11, in 2.22 I couldn't find anything similar, maybe it was an idea in 1.11 and got scrapped in 2.22 and subsequent films? Is there any mention of this in the scripts, storyboards, etc?
